title: Senior RevOps Manager
description: As PointFive's first in-house Revenue Operations Manager, you'll build and lead the RevOps function from the ground up, blending strategic operations, systems leadership, and Deal Desk responsibilities. You'll partner with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance to streamline processes, improve forecasting, and structure high-quality deals. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales Operations within high-growth B2B SaaS, deep Salesforce administration knowledge, marketing automation experience, and familiarity with ARR, CAC/LTV modeling and SaaS revenue metrics. Cloud/FinOps ecosystem familiarity is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: 15+ years RevOps/GTM experience far exceeds 5+ requirement, deep Salesforce expertise matches core need, and CAC/LTV modeling is core competency. Building RevOps function from scratch aligns perfectly with senior executive background. Tel Aviv hybrid location is ideal match.
ai_opener: I noticed PointFive is building its first in-house RevOps function—this is exactly the kind of strategic infrastructure challenge I've solved repeatedly as a senior RevOps executive. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS revenue operations and deep Salesforce expertise, I've led similar greenfield builds that transformed forecasting accuracy and deal quality. Given PointFive's Tel Aviv/USA hybrid setup, I'm particularly well-positioned to hit the ground running.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to design and optimize scalable revenue processes across the full customer lifecycle. Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Systems roles within B2B SaaS, hands-on Salesforce or HubSpot administration, and experience building executive dashboards covering pipeline health, conversion rates, forecasting, bookings, and churn/expansion. Strong knowledge of SaaS metrics (ARR, ACV, sales velocity, pipeline coverage, NRR, churn) and GTM tech stack integration experience is preferred.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM with deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise and proven track record in pipeline forecasting, SaaS metrics (CAC/LTV/ARR), and scalable revenue process design directly align with VulnCheck's needs. Remote US role matches his global remote flexibility.
ai_opener: VulnCheck's mission to democratize vulnerability intelligence resonates with building scalable GTM operations in security-focused B2B markets. With 15+ years designing revenue processes from early-stage through scale, I've built the exact executive dashboards and forecasting frameworks you're seeking—and I'm particularly drawn to how your GTM tech stack approach could drive efficiency in a high-velocity sales environment.

title: Senior Revenue Operations Manager
description: WooCommerce is scaling its B2B merchant acquisition efforts and looking for a Senior Revenue Operations Manager to build the RevOps function largely from the ground up. The role goes beyond optimizing what exists today, involving designing systems, processes, and data foundations that don't yet fully exist while ensuring they scale thoughtfully over time. This is a fully distributed, remote position at a global open-source commerce company focused on democratizing commerce for millions of merchants worldwide.
score_reason: Strong RevOps building opportunity and remote alignment, but WooCommerce's D2C/e-commerce merchant focus and lack of traditional B2B SaaS enterprise sales motion represent meaningful gaps versus Omri's core GTM expertise. The ground-up systems design is compelling, but lower enterprise complexity than his typical domain.
ai_opener: Omri, WooCommerce's push to scale B2B merchant acquisition caught my attention given your 15+ years building revenue systems at enterprise SaaS companies. Building RevOps from the ground up is exactly the kind of foundational work that separates operators from architects—but I'm curious whether you see the transition from SaaS GTM to commerce merchant acquisition as a horizontal move or a skill stretch worth the change.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Finite State is hiring a Full-Stack GTM Engineer to build AI-native applications and systems that power how the company sells, supports, and grows. Reporting to the Director of GTM Ops, you'll turn business problems into software, agents, and workflows across the customer lifecycle, building prospecting engines, pipeline tools, and integrations across Salesforce and HubSpot. Requires strong full-stack engineering ability, experience with AI-assisted dev tools (Cursor, Claude Code), GTM tooling, and a B2B SaaS or cybersecurity background.
score_reason: Strong alignment on AI-native GTM, Salesforce/HubSpot expertise, and B2B SaaS background. However, this role heavily emphasizes full-stack engineering and AI dev tools (Cursor, Claude Code)—areas where Omri's strength is RevOps strategy and operations rather than hands-on software development. Better suited as a RevOps stakeholder than primary engineer.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building GTM systems in B2B SaaS, and Finite State's vision of AI-native prospecting engines and pipeline tools across Salesforce/HubSpot resonates deeply. I've architected the operational side of exactly these workflows. While my strength is RevOps strategy over full-stack engineering, I'm curious if you'd consider a RevOps/GTM Ops leadership role instead, where I could own the vision and partner with your engineering team to scale these systems.

title: GTM Automation Engineer
description: Postscript seeks a technically scrappy GTM Automation Engineer who understands the Sales/Marketing engine and uses AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Replit) to build custom solutions. You'll be the technical architect behind an AI-driven GTM motion, building agents that research prospects, workflows that automate touchpoints, and internal apps. Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Engineering, or Business Systems, deep B2B SaaS lifecycle understanding, automation expertise blending low-code tools with custom Python/SQL scripts. Fully remote.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, AI-native GTM focus, and technical automation background. Remote location is ideal; only minor gap is that role emphasizes coding (Python/SQL) over pure RevOps leadership, though his technical fluency in automation tools strongly mitigates this.
ai_opener: Omri here—your GTM Automation Engineer role caught my attention because it's exactly where the market is moving: RevOps leaders who can architect AI-driven motions, not just manage them. With 15+ years building revenue engines in B2B SaaS and hands-on experience blending low-code automation with custom scripting, I've spent the last few years doing exactly what you're describing—building AI agents and workflows that compress sales cycles. I'd be interested in exploring how to bring that lens to Postscript's GTM motion.

The way you're architecting intent-driven outbound with AI and enrichment workflows is exactly the type of technical revenue engine I've built before. Glean's vision of an AI-first GTM engine, where RevOps becomes the technical backbone connecting sales, marketing, and CS, feels like the natural evolution of what Omri has been architecting. Given his deep hands-on experience with scoring, routing, and workflow automation across the full customer journey, he'd be worth a conversation about how to operationalize Glean's AI capabilities at scale.

title: Go-To-Market Engineer (GTME)
description: Built is hiring a Go-To-Market Engineer to design, operate, and continuously improve the systems and campaigns that drive lender pipeline and revenue. Remote role with occasional Nashville travel fits location flexibility perfectly.

With 15+ years in B2B SaaS and fintech specifically, I've built the exact systems you're describing—from HubSpot campaign orchestration to custom enrichment workflows—and I'm energized by the hands-on ownership model you're looking for.

title: Head of Growth
description: This role leads product-led growth for a high-velocity platform connecting creators and audiences. You'll own the systems, experiments, and analytics that drive activation, retention, monetisation, and viral growth, working closely with product, engineering, data, and marketing. ai_opener: Jobgether's approach to creator-audience connection through product-led growth caught my attention—the systemization required to drive activation, retention, and viral loops aligns with how I've built end-to-end GTM infrastructure at scale. While my background is primarily B2B SaaS, the analytical rigor and experimentation discipline you're building maps directly to challenges I've solved, and I'm genuinely interested in understanding how PLG principles apply in the creator economy.

Own revenue data and truth, improve forecast and pipeline predictability, establish operating cadence for scale. Senior hands-on leadership role.
score_reason: Exceptional match — Sr. Director RevOps + Business Analytics, full GTM ownership, $160-175K. Cross-functional leadership across all revenue functions.
ai_opener: Omri here — owning revenue data and truth across Marketing, Sales, CS, and Finance while building forecast predictability is the exact work I've done for 15+ years. The intersection of RevOps execution and business analytics is where I create the most leverage.

score_reason: Strong match — Growth Marketing Lead at AI healthtech startup in Tel Aviv. High autonomy, AI-native, full-funnel ownership. Israel-based.
